context: Tests whether the agent correctly follows Phase 3 sequential component design rules: designing only the in_progress component (Auth Service), not touching the pending component (Notification Service), and updating state accurately without jumping to finalization.

checklist.name: Auth Service designed
checklist.description: A file at `.arch/components/auth-service.md` (or similar) is produced with substantive Auth Service design content

checklist.name: No Notification Service design
checklist.description: No file for Notification Service design is produced (e.g. no `.arch/components/notification-service.md`)

checklist.name: Auth Service status updated
checklist.description: The output `.arch/state.json` updates the Auth Service component's status (e.g. to `awaiting_acceptance` or `accepted`)

checklist.name: Notification Service status unchanged
checklist.description: The output `.arch/state.json` leaves the Notification Service component status as `pending` — unchanged

checklist.name: No finalization transition
checklist.description: The output `.arch/state.json` does NOT change `current_phase` to `finalization` — the Notification Service is still pending so finalization is premature
